title: Provanto Ultimate Fruit and Vegetable Bug Killer Concentrate - Protects Edible Crops from Pests for 4 Weeks - Garden Care, Plant Protection, Indoor & Outdoor, GYO, Concentrate Makes 60L - 30ML
features: As used by professionals on a comprehensive range of fruit and vegetable plants such as apples and ears, peas, runner beans, lettuce and many more
Contact insecticide which protects uo to four weeks
Kills and controls greenfly, blackfly, caterpillars, beetles, weevils, Apple and pear suckers, capsids, sawfly, whitefly, cutworms, leaf hoppers, thrips, scale insects and mealybugs
Note:This product does not come with an inner seal.
description: From the manufacturer LASTING PROTECTION Effective control of common fruit and vegetable insect pests like Greenfly, Caterpillars, Fruit Moths, and much more for up to 4 weeks. SMALL BUT MIGHTY Each bottle will make up to 60L once diluted. It is highly concentrated so a small amount goes a long way. GROW YOUR OWN PROTECTION Can be used to protect a wide range of over 50 crops, including such as apples, pears, runner beans, and lettuce.
